title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 22 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 22 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 22 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/11/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.96 % today, the main contract closed 725. The traders' willingness to ship is less .The steelmills are purchase on demand. The overall trading sentiment of the market is less.
